name: Haasil
overview: Haasil is the story of two brothers Ranvir and Kabir Raichand, whose lives get entwined with the entry of a smart and righteous lawyer, Aanchal Shrivastav. Aanchal, a lawyer, seeks revenge on Ranvir Raichand, a powerful tycoon, and vows to leave no stone unturned to destroy him and his business empire.
